summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently using the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was invented; close, merge, fix, and PR-raise paths are unavailable or blocked by the job. Ready/green focused fixes are kept open for maintainer judgment, proof/check/review-blocked PRs are kept open with exact blockers, and the linked security-sensitive ref is quarantined only for central security handling.

actions.reason: Maintainer/product and technical correctness judgment is required before any close/merge/fix action; keep the PR open.
Not low-signal closable under this job and not a duplicate; leave open with failed proof as the blocker.
Focused bug-fix correctness and proof sufficiency require maintainer judgment; keep open.
Provider/auth behavior change needs maintainer technical correctness judgment; no close action is safe.
Useful focused bug-fix PR with unique remaining work; maintainer review is required before any finalization.
Focused session-state behavior change with maintainer signal and stale/dependency-guard update requirement; keep open for maintainer judgment.
Focused gateway API behavior and mixed check history require maintainer technical correctness judgment; no close action is allowed.
Actionable bot review findings and failing checks block finalization; keep open for author/maintainer follow-up.
Useful availability fix with maintainer-review scope; no merge/fix/close action is permitted in this job.
Likely useful replacement PR, but proof/review state needs maintainer judgment; no close action is safe.
Route only this exact security-sensitive linked ref to central OpenClaw security handling.

#86900: maintainer review and branch/update work needed after dependency-guard rebase-needed comment.
#86913: gateway restart pending API PR has mixed historical failing checks and needs maintainer correctness judgment.
#86936: unresolved Copilot review findings and failing checks block finalization.
#88908: large gateway availability fix needs maintainer review despite author-addressed Copilot findings.
